title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build an agentic AI application using Claude Code, covering three interfaces: desktop app, terminal CLI, and VS Code integration. The example project is an AI Resume and Cover Letter Generator with features for personalization and skill recommendations.
